items.title: Irishman jailed for murdering American woman he met in Hungary nightclub
items.summary: An Irish man has been sentenced to 14 years in prison in Hungary after being convicted of murdering American tourist Mackenzie Michalski before attempting to cover up the crime and dispose of her body.

items.title: Remaining Four Original Faust Members Announce Four New Albums: Hear A Track From Each
items.summary: Krautrock greats Faust have been around for over half a century in various permutations. Today, the group's four surviving original members announced a fun initiative: They're each releasing their own solo album. You know, like KISS! Bureau B will release all four LPs simultaneously in September. The post Remaining Four Original Faust Members Announce Four New Albums: Hear A Track From Each appeared first on Stereogum.
items.audio: audio/Remaining Four Original Faust Members Announce Fou.mp3

items.title: Meaningful Stone – “1+1= 0” (Feat. Jay Som)
items.summary: South Korean musical artist Kim Jimin records indie pop under the name Meaningful Stone. Earlier this year, she traveled to Los Angeles to collaborate with Melina Duterte, the beloved artist and producer better known as Jay Som. The result is "1+1=0," a new single that shimmers and jangles with the best of them. The post Meaningful Stone – “1+1= 0” (Feat. Jay Som) appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Ben Folds To Produce, Music Direct, & Appear In Off-Broadway Musical
items.summary: Earlier this week, Ben Folds Five announced they were releasing the shelved first attempt at their debut album for its 30th anniversary. Now, Ben Folds has been revealed as the producer and music director for an upcoming Off-Broadway one-woman musical called We've Been Here Before, and he'll be performing in it as well. The post Ben Folds To Produce, Music Direct, & Appear In Off-Broadway Musical appeared first on Stereogum.
items.audio: audio/Ben Folds To Produce_ Music Direct_ _ Appear In Of.mp3
